LAW AND MOTION 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT HEALTH BODY SERVICES LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT HEALTH BODY SERVICES, LLC VIOLATED PROPOSITION 65 AND WHETHER THAT ACT APPLIES TO DEFENDANT IS A CONTESTED FACTUAL ISSUE NOT AMENDABLE TO RESOLUTION ON A DEMURRER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HEALTH BODY SERVICES LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that Health Body Services, LLC violated Proposition 65 and whether that Act applies to defendant is a contested factual issue not amendable to resolution on a demurrer.
